operations.CopyBlueprintStage: Copies a Blueprint from one stage to another
operations.CreateBlueprint: Creates an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Blueprint
operations.CreateBlueprintVersion: Creates a new version of an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Blueprint
operations.CreateDataAutomationLibrary: Creates an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Library
operations.CreateDataAutomationProject: Creates an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Project
operations.DeleteBlueprint: Deletes an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Blueprint

operations.DeleteDataAutomationProject: Deletes an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Project

operations.GetDataAutomationLibrary: Gets an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Library
operations.GetDataAutomationLibraryEntity: Gets an existing entity based on entity type from the library
operations.GetDataAutomationLibraryIngestionJob: API used to get status of data automation library ingestion job
operations.GetDataAutomationProject: Gets an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Project
operations.InvokeBlueprintOptimizationAsync: Invoke an async job to perform Blueprint Optimization
operations.InvokeDataAutomationLibraryIngestionJob: Async API: Invoke data automation library ingestion job
operations.ListBlueprints: Lists all existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Blueprints
operations.ListDataAutomationLibraries: Lists all existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Libraries
operations.ListDataAutomationLibraryEntities: Lists all stored entities in the library
operations.ListDataAutomationLibraryIngestionJobs: Lists all data automation library ingestion jobs
operations.ListDataAutomationProjects: Lists all existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Projects
operations.ListTagsForResource: List tags for an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation resource
operations.TagResource: Tag an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation resource
operations.UntagResource: Untag an Amazon Bedrock Data Automation resource
operations.UpdateBlueprint: Updates an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Blueprint
operations.UpdateDataAutomationLibrary: Updates an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Library
operations.UpdateDataAutomationProject: Updates an existing Amazon Bedrock Data Automation Project
